title: Enumerate Users by Bruteforcing RID
html:
Enumerate Users by Bruteforcing RID

Enumerate users by bruteforcing the RID on the remote target

nxc smb <CIDR> -u <USERNAME> -p <PASSWORD> --rid-brute
excerpt: Enumerate Users by Bruteforcing RID Enumerate users by bruteforcing the RID on the remote target nxc smb <CIDR> -u <USERNAME> -p <PASSWORD> --rid-brute
